name: Toshi
description: A terminal companion — the Toshi mascot on the side, watching your zero session. Ask it what changed, why a test is red, or what to do next.
author: philpof102-svg
_note: Targets the gitlawb/zero ./.zero/plugins/<id>/ convention. Confirm field names against zero's current plugin schema (AGENTS.md §Plugins) before opening the PR — this manifest is v0.
